overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a cyberpunk bar interior from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit pool tables, arcade machines, and bar seating. The camera moves steadily through the atmospheric space showcasing detailed industrial architecture with exposed ductwork and vibrant neon lighting effects.

events.description: camera passes the pool table and approaches the main bar counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar entrance area past the pool table toward the main counter

notable_agents.action: patron playing pool with cue stick
patron standing at the bar counter

entered.detail: red-felt pool table with wooden rails and balls arranged for play
circular neon sign with pink and blue glow on the left wall
long curved bar counter with blue neon underlighting
pink and red arcade cabinet with glowing trim on the right side
large circular grated ceiling light emitting warm yellow glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cyberpunk bar near a pool table where patrons are playing. The camera walks forward past the table toward the bar counter, passing a pink arcade machine on the right. Neon signs and industrial ceiling fixtures illuminate the concrete floor.

events.description: moving from pool area into the main bar seating area with windows visible

agents.ego_description: moving along the bar counter past patrons seated on stools

notable_agents.action: patron sitting on bar stool facing the counter

entered.detail: black leather bar stools lined up along the counter
large windows showing the neon-lit street outside
vertical neon light strips in pink and blue

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the main bar counter where patrons sit on black stools. Windows reveal the night street outside with neon lights. The pool table and entrance area fall behind as the camera progresses deeper into the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: back seating area with booths and arcade machines

events.description: transitioning from bar counter to booth seating area in the back

agents.ego_description: walking through the rear seating area past booth benches and arcade machines

notable_agents.action: patron sitting in booth seating along the wall

entered.detail: green upholstered booth benches with wooden tables
green and black vintage-style arcade cabinet
yellow poster with FIXER text on the wall
horizontal red neon light strips above windows

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the back seating area featuring green booth benches and a green arcade machine. A Fixer poster is visible on the wall. The bar counter recedes into the background as the camera passes through this more secluded section of the bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path along bar toward entrance

events.description: turning slightly to follow the curve of the bar counter back toward the front

agents.ego_description: walking back along the opposite side of the bar past seated patrons

notable_agents.action: patron with cybernetic implants sitting at the bar
bartender serving drinks behind the counter

entered.detail: cyan neon arrow sign pointing left above the windows

segments.scene_description: The camera circles back along the opposite side of the bar, returning toward the front entrance area. The bar counter is now on the left with patrons seated on stools. Neon signs including a cyan arrow are visible above the street-facing windows as the walkthrough completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk bar, moving from the active gaming area into a secluded lounge before circling back toward the entrance. It begins by gliding past a pool table and a pink arcade machine, with industrial ceiling fixtures casting a glow over the concrete floor. As the camera progresses, the scene shifts toward the main bar counter where patrons sit on black stools against a backdrop of night-street windows. The movement then carries deeper into the establishment, passing a Fixer poster and green booth seating near a green arcade machine as the main bar recedes. Finally, the camera circles back along the opposite side of the counter, returning toward the front entrance with cyan neon arrows visible above the windows.
